Home.heroDescription: 8 subsidiaries, production bases in 14 provinces of China and 4 cities in Thailand, with nearly 7,500 employees
Home.aboutDescription: P.M.I. Head Office was established in January 2015, overseeing the Chief Financial Officer Office, Central Research Institute, Human Resources Department, Business Planning Department, and 8 subsidiaries (including 3 packaging businesses, 3 raw material businesses, 1 food ingredient business, and 1 logistics business). Production bases are located in 14 provinces in China and 4 cities in Thailand. As of December 2025, P.M.I. Head Office has nearly 7,500 employees.

Home.pmiM: Materials: Sesame oil and sesame products supplier - Tingzhi Food; Food-grade modified starch manufacturer dedicated to R&D and application innovation of starch and starch derivatives - China Prostar; Food-grade cassava native starch and modified starch manufacturer - Thailand Prostar

About.companyDescription: P.M.I. Head Office was established in January 2015, overseeing the Chief Financial Officer Office, Central Research Institute, Human Resources Department, Business Planning Department, and 8 subsidiaries (including 3 packaging businesses, 3 raw material businesses, 1 food ingredient business, and 1 logistics business). Production bases are located in 14 provinces in China and 4 cities in Thailand. As of December 2025, P.M.I. Head Office has nearly 7,500 employees.
About.pmiDescription: P.M.I. Head Office takes 'Steady, Technology, Quality, Cost' as its strategic policy, responsible for integration, service, performance, and supervision of its 8 subsidiaries. Each subsidiary operates with the business philosophy of 'Integrity, Pragmatism, Innovation', continuously striving to create more value for customers through cost improvement, technological innovation, and quality enhancement.
About.scaleBasesDetail: 14 provinces in China + 4 cities in Thailand
About.factorySubtitle: Production bases in 14 provinces in China and 4 cities in Thailand
About.ctaSubtitle: We look forward to cooperating with you to create a better future. If you have any questions or needs, please feel free to contact us.

historyData.event: Production bases expanded to 14 provinces across China
Nearly 7,500 employees, production bases established in 4 cities in Thailand

data.title: PMI Shanghai Office Q2 Birthday Celebration
data.excerpt: PMI Shanghai employees gathered together to celebrate the Q2 employee birthday party, with a warm atmosphere that enhanced team cohesion.
data.content: Recently, PMI Shanghai held the Q2 employee birthday celebration at the headquarters building. At the event, birthday stars gathered together to share delicious cakes and participate in interactive games. Company management attended the scene to deliver birthday blessings and exquisite gifts to employees. Everyone spent an unforgettable afternoon in laughter, further enhancing team cohesion and sense of belonging.

data.title: P.M.I. May Purification Journey
data.excerpt: P.M.I. organized employees to carry out May purification journey activities, allowing employees to relax in nature and enhance communication.
data.content: In the warm sunshine of May, P.M.I. organized employees to carry out a unique purification journey. Activities included hiking, team building, meditation relaxation and other links. Employees released work stress in nature, enhanced mutual understanding, and improved team collaboration spirit.

data.title: PMI Herb Garden + Mogan Mountain Autumn Expansion
data.excerpt: PMI organized employees to carry out autumn expansion activities at Herb Garden and Mogan Mountain, challenging themselves and refining the team.
data.content: In the crisp autumn season, PMI organized employees to carry out autumn expansion training at the scenic Herb Garden and Mogan Mountain. The activities set up classic expansion projects such as high-altitude bridge, trust fall, and graduation wall. Employees broke through themselves in challenges and enhanced trust in collaboration. This activity not only exercised employees' willpower but also enhanced team cohesion and combat effectiveness.

Recruitment.joinUsDescription: P.M.I. Head Office was established in 2015, with 8 subsidiaries and nearly 7,500 employees. We adhere to the strategic policy of 'Steady, Technology, Quality, Cost' and the core values of 'Integrity, Pragmatism, Innovation, Progress'. Here, you will get broad development space, competitive compensation and benefits, and a professional training system.

advantages.title: Professional Team
advantages.description: Our team consists of experienced professionals with deep expertise and rich practical experience, capable of providing high-quality services to customers.

advantages.title: Quality Assurance
advantages.description: We strictly control service quality, establish a comprehensive quality management system, and ensure that every project meets the highest standards.

advantages.title: Full-process Support
advantages.description: We provide comprehensive, full-cycle service support, from project consulting to implementation and delivery, to after-sales maintenance, ensuring customers have no worries.

advantages.title: Technical Innovation
advantages.description: We keep up with technology development trends, continuously introduce new technologies and methods, and improve service quality and efficiency.

advantages.title: Customer First
